info.title: Favro API
info.description: Favro is a collaborative planning and project management tool. The API provides access to organizations, collections, widgets (boards/backlogs), columns, cards, comments, tags, tasks, task lists, groups, custom fields, webhooks, and card activities/dependencies.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all users in the organization.

parameters.name: X-Favro-Backend-Identifier
parameters.description: Backend routing identifier from previous response. Required for paginated requests.

parameters.name: X-Favro-Backend-Identifier
parameters.description: Backend routing identifier from previous response. Required for paginated requests.

parameters.name: collectionId
parameters.description: Collection to delete widget from. If omitted, all instances deleted.

parameters.name: everywhere
parameters.description: Delete all instances of the card.

basicAuth.description: Use your Favro email as username and password or API token as password.

requestId.description: Request ID for subsequent page requests.
